text:
Weilun Zhang, Freshman, China
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
December 19, 2014 - “Since college began, I have been devoting myself to trying new things. I don’t want to just choose a normal path and be an ordinary person. I want to try something different. I like the feeling of exploration. Everyday when I wake up, I feel like I have the passion to do anything that I want; when I go to bed, I can say that I have no regrets for the day." - Weilun Zhang, Freshman, China

text_blocks.text: December 19, 2014 - “Since college began, I have been devoting myself to trying new things. I don’t want to just choose a normal path and be an ordinary person. I want to try something different. I like the feeling of exploration. Everyday when I wake up, I feel like I have the passion to do anything that I want; when I go to bed, I can say that I have no regrets for the day." - Weilun Zhang, Freshman, China
